# Impacts

Impacts sub-package has the abstract classes of inventory records ([`Records`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Records)) and databases ([`ImpactsDatabase`](impacts-database.md#pod_lca.impacts.ImpactsDatabase)). The inventory records of [`Impacts`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Impacts), [`Emissions`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Emissions), and [`CarbonStorage`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.CarbonStorage) are containers for those LCA inventories. The databases of [`ElectricityImpactsDatabase`](impacts-database.md#pod_lca.impacts.ElectricityImpactsDatabase) and [`EOLImpactsDatabase`](impacts-database.md#pod_lca.impacts.EOLImpactsDatabase) speacialised classes to manage and retrieve inventory data for electricity and end-of-life pathways, respectively.

In addition, the [`openLCA`](openlca-pipeline.md#pod_lca.impacts.openLCA) class provides access to OpenLCA API to pre-process and retrieve data from USLCI and Ecoinvent databases.
